gigapan.description:
This shows bottles on a table near sunrise at foo camp in 2007.  This is now my earliest GigaPan uploaded to the gigapan site.

This image would not stitch with the stitcher available 'back then,' and so far it probably holds the record for longest period between taking images and uploading a stitched image to gigapan.org.

Oddly it seems compositionally evocative of the Gasworks gigapan I uploaded right before it.
